title: Advancement Unlocked
description: Ever thought Vanilla Advancements were lacking? Ever thought Bedrock got the better piece of the pie? (in terms of advancements) Well look no further, this mod adds a large amount of advancements and will continue to add more
body:
![Advancement Unlocked Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d30d5d231d2255b9b8c481cb7bd25ce371a2958d.png)

# ~~**The mod is getting a big update pretty soon and is going 1.20.6 wooo! (mod kinda corrupted on 1.20.4 sorry)**~~ It is getting a update possibly but I've been busy with a lot

## Well What Does It Do?
You may be asking, _**WHAT THE HELL DOES THIS MOD EVEN DO??!???**_ and to that I say.. buckle up since its gonna be fun ride!

  Well first of all this mod adds:

- Well guess what.. **ADVANCEMENTS**
- **Advancements**
- Maybe some more **Advancements**
- Oh just give it another sprinke of **Advancements**

Yeah thats all this mod adds. Its a lot of them though, I think?
Ill continue to add more as I add more, and if you want progress or a list of advancements hell even just a look into my other mods (or soon to be mods I guess) then you can **join my discord** right [here](https://discord.gg/trKS5AMY)

<details>
<summary>List of Advancements</summary>

- **Act Now, Offer Ends Soon:** Trade with a Villager in a End City
- **Someone Among Us is Sus:** Eat some suspicious stew
- **An Old Friend:** Name a Pig Reuben
- **Arachnophobia:** Kill a docile spider
- **Audiophile:** Collect EVERY music disc (yes every one)
- **Block By Block:** Place atleast 10,000 blocks (might change to blocks broken and make another for placed?)
- **I Got a Bone to Pick!:** Kill a Skeleton with a Bone
- **Breaking My Heart:** Kill the unkillable (The Warden)
- and _many more_ you can find either in the mod or on my [discord server](https://discord.gg/trKS5AMY)

</details>
